text:
In the projection, $personName performed a standard military salute, "Confirmed, friend of $theFaction. How can I help?"
OR
"Identified, my friend. How have you been?"
OR
"Welcome! Dear friend. May your future be illuminated by the truth!"

"This is $theFaction's territory. We built it with our sweat and we will defend it with our blood." The projection of $heOrShe $personRank $personName makes you uneasy.
OR
 $personRank says succinctly, "Now that you've made your decision, prepare to die."
options: cutCommLink: cut off the communication link

text:
"You are causing harm to the legitimate rights of $theFaction. Please stop your actions immediately and lower your shields, otherwise we have the right to take legitimate defensive measures."
OR
"This is $theFaction. I have requested support from friendly units. You should immediately stop attacking my unit." $personRank $personName solemnly declares to you.
OR
The chilling intention almost overflowed from the communication projection, "Never retreat, no matter the cost!"
options: cutCommLink: cut off the communication link

text:
"Today is the day you say goodbye to the observable universe." $personName showed no signs of nervousness.
OR
"No need to say more. Warriors crave glory, and $theFaction doesn't care about your last words."
OR
"Purge the ignorance." The officer unilaterally cut off the connection without even looking at you.
options: cutCommLink: cut off the communication link

text: "Open the transponder immediately and identify yourself! Otherwise, our department will implement law enforcement powers in accordance with the law."
options:
turnOnTransponder: Turn on the communicator
cutCommLink: cut off the communication link

text:
"You should not hide within our jurisdiction, otherwise I will safeguard the legitimate rights and interests of $theFaction in accordance with the law."
OR
"Only those who are above board and aboveboard would disdain sexual behavior!"
options:
turnOnTransponder: Turn on the communicator
cutCommLink: cut off the communication link

text:
$personName opened a recording device, "Captain Independent, please cooperate with me to conduct a legality check?"
OR
"Identity confirmation. Please declare your purpose of entry and cooperate with us in cargo inspection."
OR
"The Armed Fleet Temporary Pass is confirmed to be valid. To ensure that your legal rights in the $theFaction-controlled galaxy are not infringed upon, please synchronize the route information to the designated frequency band."

Knights of the Red Stripe As she always does, treat your request with the necessary caution, the appropriate enthusiasm, and the necessary prudence. As long as you do not violate local laws and do not infringe upon the legal rights of the Red Stripe Knights and its subjects, you are almost unimpeded, but that's the extent of it.

You have been judged by the official think tank of the Red Stripe Knights as having excellent moral character and having certain cooperation value, which means that you have certain convenience in entering and exiting the jurisdiction and cross-border trade. It also means that you have access to some non-regulated products in the Red Stripe Knights military market. Some young radicals have also reduced their hostility towards you and began to regard you as a reliable member of the great cause of realizing the renaissance of the Sector.

Your recognition of the values ​​​​of the Red Stripe Knights has won the favor and respect of most of them. Even if there is no written legal treaty, you have treatment similar to that of a foreign officer. Your cooperation value is further recognized, and you yourself are judged by the think tank as an extraterritorial friendly entity. As a friend of the Red Stripe Knights, you can obtain some controlled items that should not be circulated in the Sector.

Your recognition of the values ​​​​of the Red Stripe Knights has won the favor and respect of most of them. Under the written legal treaty, you almost have good treatment similar to that of a Guards Corps officer. Your cooperation value is further recognized, and you yourself are judged by the think tank as an extraterritorial friendly entity. As a friend of the Red Stripe Knights, you can obtain some controlled items that should not be circulated in the Sector.

You are considered by the decision-making and leadership team of the Red Stripe Knights to be a credible extraterritorial entity and a trustworthy friend of the Knights. Your interests will be given priority without harming the legitimate rights of the Knights. You will be eligible to use the senior armed forces currently in service in the Guards Corps, and the balance of your cooperation with the Knights will also be tilted towards your interests.

The Red Stripe Knights regard you as a loyal friend who can be entrusted with their backs. The Knights will not have any secrets from you. Your authority is equivalent to that of the Pope under certain circumstances. The Guards Corps can also accept your dispatch to a certain extent. You will be eligible to use the top weapons of the Knights' armed forces that are currently in service or are not yet in service. But this also means that one day in the future you and the Knights will face some major threats that they cannot face alone.

The administrative agencies of the Knights are still protecting your legal rights within the jurisdiction of the Red Stripe Knights in accordance with the law, but their suspicion of you is written on everything except their faces. You can already clearly feel their increasingly harsh attitude and more and more seemingly unnecessary suspicions. Even though the open market of the Order is still open to you, you can already expect that official law enforcement agencies will pay more attention to you in the foreseeable future.

The armed forces of the Knights have listed you as a potential enemy, and the law enforcement fleet will update in real time and track your whereabouts. The Order's administrative agencies will place you on the Entity Sanctions List, closely review every transaction involving you and initiate implicit sanctions against you. Within the jurisdiction of the Knights, you always feel that there are a few more pairs of eyes around you, and you feel unsafe.

You can no longer openly and legally enter the regular market of the Red Stripe Knights. You have been included in the surface entity list by the armed forces of the Red Stripe Knights, and the Guards Corps has approved an unlimited force upgrade for you. If you are identified within the jurisdiction of the Knights, you will be fully pursued by the armed forces of the Knights until your flagship is destroyed.

You have been judged as an enemy that must be eliminated by the decision-makers of the Red Stripe Knights. The Guards Corps is training with you as an imaginary enemy every moment. Erasing your physical presence will become the biggest focus of the Knights' armed forces in the future. It seems that even the indifferent Pope made a comment on your wanted order for expedited processing.

You are a great friend of the Order of the Red Stripe and a hero to the people of the Order. With your help, the Knights survived the crisis, and your name will be recorded in the textbook for future generations to learn from.

script:
AddText "It is rare for you to see such a blessed place in today's Sector. You can feel the vitality and hope filling the air. The people here protect the land and themselves very well." marketFlavorTextColor
AddText "Administrative agency staff are verifying your market access qualifications. After completing the quick and systematic procedures, you will be allowed to trade in the open market." marketFlavorTextColor

AddText "From the moment you stepped into the airport, you noticed the rush of the people in this colony: they all seemed to have clear goals and were in a hurry. You temporarily put this observation behind you and started to go through the market access procedures" marketFlavorTextColor

AddText "This colony built on a gas giant planet will leave you with a rigorous impression when it docks. It seems that the grassroots officials here are well-educated in science. You can see the huge star fortress blocking most of the sun through the port window." marketFlavorTextColor

AddText "Whether it is viewed from the outside or from the inside of this huge fortress, this is an undoubted military center; or in other words, compared to the dual-use facilities common in other colonies of the Knights, this fortress is more pure. I don't know if it is because of the proximity of Zhu Zhechi, but the officers here always have the flavor of scholars." marketFlavorTextColor

text:
The Red Stripe Knights' logo flashes for a moment and then transforms into a projection of a young girl. She looks at you with clear and slightly curious eyes.
"Hello! Are you Commander $playerName? How can I help you? This famous commander~"

You see her figure in the projection greeting you with some brisk gesture
"Hey~ Commander $playerName~, tell me what you want to do today~"
Next you want to:

text:
Her joy was beyond words
"Okay, okay~ Commander~, what are you going to talk about? As long as you can drag me out of this dark paperwork, you will be my savior!!"

RS_Komet_Faction: Let’s talk about the Knights
RS_Komet_egnumDei: Let’s talk about the RegnumDei galaxy
RS_Komet_Personal:Talk about herself
RS_Komet_Chat_Back:Nothing, I think I have to go back

text:
She paused while processing the paperwork and looked up at you.
"If you ask me this, even though I don't understand the big truth, I think people here live a very happy life, and I have made a lot of friends~"
options:
RS_Komet_RegnumDei: Let’s talk about the RegnumDei galaxy
RS_Komet_Personal:Talk about herself
RS_Komet_Chat_Back:It's okay, I think I have to go back

text:
She sits up straight, as if she wants to convey her determination to you through her body posture.
"I don't know much about politics and calculations, but I know how my life has come about so far. People here are kind to me, so I should do my best."
options:
RS_Komet_Faction: Let’s talk about the Knights
RS_Komet_Personal:Talk about herself

text:
She tilted her head and seemed to be thinking about something.
"What color do you like? Of course it's red! No, no, no, it's not a secondary reason like blood. It's just that you see, red has a sense of speed. It flies in the sky like a red line cutting through the universe. It's very cool~"
options:
RS_Komet_Faction: Let’s talk about the Knights
RS_Komet_egnumDei: Let’s talk about the RegnumDei galaxy

text:
The energetic girl in the projection is waving to you
"Have a safe journey~, Commander $playerName. Remember to bring me some souvenirs~"
"I really don't know which arrogant explorer is responsible for this. Recently, their movements have become more and more frequent. I owe half of my daily workload to them >.<"
options: RSContactBounty_docket: Ask her if she needs help
RSMilitaryCustomBounty_1: Ask her for details

text: "Okay~ It would be great if Commander is willing to help~" Her excitement was palpable, but was quickly overshadowed by seriousness. "But Commander, this is quite a troublesome job. Let me explain it to you first."
options: RSMilitaryCustomBounty_2:What can I do

text: "The content is simple and straightforward. Come here and clear out a fleet of automated ships. No restrictions other than that." She sends a message to your Tripad, pointing to a remote star system, but little else.
options: RSMilitaryCustomBounty_3: Can you have specific information about this batch of unmanned fleets?

text: You can clearly observe her disappointment. "Although we don't want to admit it, we still don't know the composition of their fleet; but one thing is certain: they behave strangely and are powerful." She stuck out her tongue, showing a trace of worry. "Commander, I suggest you think carefully~"
options:

RSMilitaryCustomBounty_1_2:Next time
